creator: dean@odyssey.apana.org.au
text:
Upgraded Port: mail/dcc-dccd to 1.3.39

Changes in this release:

	o	Fix bug that caused `cdcc "clients -V"` to sometimes 
		report version numbers of '?'.

	o	Change dccd to prefer recycling an old, almost idle 
		client rate-limiting block instead of the oldest block.

	o	Modify /var/dcc/libexec/list-clients.
